text: We were in the midst of the greatest economic crisis since the Great Depression,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: the previous administration had put two wars on our nation’s credit card,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and the American Dream had slipped out of reach for too many.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: Today, our economy is growing again,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: al-Qaeda is weaker than at any point since 9/11,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and our manufacturing sector is growing for the first time in more than a decade.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: We gather to reclaim the basic bargain that built the largest middle class and the most prosperous nation on Earth –
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: the simple principle that in America, hard work should pay off,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: responsibility should be rewarded,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and each one of us should be able to go as far as our talent and drive take us.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: We Democrats offer America the opportunity to move our country forward by creating an economy built to last and built from the middle out.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: Mitt Romney and the Republican Party have a drastically different vision.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: They still believe the best way to grow the economy is from the top down
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: – the same approach that benefited the wealthy few but crashed the economy and crushed the middle class.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: Democrats see a young country continually made stronger by the greatest diversity of talent and ingenuity in the world,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and a nation of people drawn to our shores from every corner of the globe.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: We believe America can succeed because the American people have never failed
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and there is nothing that together we cannot accomplish.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: Reclaiming the economic security of the middle class is the challenge we must overcome today.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: That begins by restoring the basic values that made our country great,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and restoring for everyone who works hard and plays by the rules the opportunity to find a job that pays the bills, turn an idea into a profitable business, care for your family, afford a home you call your own and health care you can count on, retire with dignity and respect,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and, most of all, give your children the kind of education that allows them to dream even bigger and go even further than you ever imagined.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: This has to be our North Star – an economy that’s built not from the top down, but from a growing middle class,
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: and that provides ladders of opportunity for those working hard to join the middle class.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: It’s the defining issue of our time and at the core of the American Dream.
title: Moving America Forward. 2012 Democratic National Platform

text: In 2016, Democrats meet in Philadelphia with the same basic belief that animated the Continental Congress when they gathered here 240 years ago: Out of many, we are one.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Under President Obama’s leadership,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: and thanks to the hard work and determination of the American people, we have come a long way from the Great Recession and the Republican policies that triggered it.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: American businesses have now added 14.8 million jobs since private-sector job growth turned positive in early 2010.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Twenty million people have gained health insurance coverage.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: The American auto industry just had its best year ever.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: And we are getting more of our energy from the sun and wind, and importing less oil from overseas.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: But too many Americans have been left out and left behind.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: They are working longer hours with less security.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Wages have barely budged
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: and the racial wealth gap remains wide,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: while the cost of everything from childcare to a college education has continued to rise.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: And for too many families, the dream of homeownership is out of reach.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: As working people struggle, the top one percent accrues more wealth and more power.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Republicans in Congress have chosen gridlock and dysfunction over trying to find solutions to the real challenges we face.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: It’s no wonder that so many feel like the system is rigged against them.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Democrats believe that cooperation is better than conflict,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: unity is better than division,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: empowerment is better than resentment,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: and bridges are better than walls.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: It’s a simple but powerful idea: we are stronger together.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: Democrats believe we are stronger when we have an economy that works for everyone
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: —an economy that grows incomes for working people,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: creates good-paying jobs,
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform

text: and puts a middle-class life within reach for more Americans.
title: 2016 Democratic Party Platform
